sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44796" key="eu)/plhktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔπληκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44796.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily struck</tr_>, so as to sound, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.721f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
